# Ideals generated by families of elements of semirings

```agda
module ring-theory.ideals-generated-by-families-of-elements-semirings where
```

## Idea

An {{#concept "ideal generated by a family of elements" Disambiguation="semiring" Agda=ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring}} `(xᵢ)ᵢ` of a [semiring](ring-theory.semirings.md) `R` is the [ideal generated by the subset](ring-theory.ideals-generated-by-subsets-semirings.lagda.md) of all the elements of the form `xᵢ` for some `i` in the indexing type of `(xᵢ)ᵢ`. In other words, the ideal generated by `(xᵢ)ᵢ` is the least [ideal](ring-theory.ideals-semirings.md) that contains all the elements `xᵢ`. In informal writing, the ideal generated by the family of elements `(xᵢ)ᵢ` is denoted by `⟨xᵢ⟩`.

## Definitions

### The predicate of being an ideal generated by a family of elements

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} (x : I → type-Semiring R)
  (J : ideal-Semiring l3 R)
  where

  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring : UUω
  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    {l4 : Level} (K : ideal-Semiring l4 R) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R J K ↔ ((i : I) → is-in-ideal-Semiring R K (x i))

  contains-element-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring →
    (i : I) → is-in-ideal-Semiring R J (x i)
  contains-element-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring U =
    forward-implication (U J) (refl-leq-ideal-Semiring R J)

  leq-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring →
    {l4 : Level} (K : ideal-Semiring l4 R)
    (k : (i : I) → is-in-ideal-Semiring R K (x i)) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R J K
  leq-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring U K =
    backward-implication (U K)
```

### The ideal generated by a family of elements of a semiring

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} (x : I → type-Semiring R)
  where

  generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    subset-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    subtype-im x

  ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    ideal-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    ideal-subset-Semiring R generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    Nonunital-Subsemiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    nonunital-subsemiring-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    subset-Semiring (l1 ⊔ l2) R
  subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    type-Semiring R → UU (l1 ⊔ l2)
  is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-in-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-prop-is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    (r : type-Semiring R) → is-prop (is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring r)
  is-prop-is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-prop-is-in-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  type-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring : UU (l1 ⊔ l2)
  type-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    type-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    type-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring → type-Semiring R
  inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    inclusion-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  ap-inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    (y z : type-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring) → y ＝ z →
    inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring y ＝
    inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring z
  ap-inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    ap-inclusion-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-in-subset-inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    (y : type-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring) →
    is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
      ( inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring y)
  is-in-subset-inclusion-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-in-subset-inclusion-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    {y z : type-Semiring R} →
    is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring y →
    (y ＝ z) → is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring z
  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-eq-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring' :
    {y z : type-Semiring R} →
    is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring z →
    (y ＝ z) → is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring y
  is-closed-under-eq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring' =
    is-closed-under-eq-subset-Semiring' R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-ideal-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-ideal-subset-Semiring R subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-ideal-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-ideal-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-additive-submonoid-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-additive-submonoid-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-additive-submonoid-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-additive-submonoid-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  contains-zero-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring (zero-Semiring R)
  contains-zero-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    contains-zero-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-addition-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-closed-under-addition-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-closed-under-addition-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-addition-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  additive-submonoid-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    Submonoid (l1 ⊔ l2) (additive-monoid-Semiring R)
  additive-submonoid-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    additive-submonoid-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-closed-under-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-closed-under-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-multiplication-ideal-Semiring R
      ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-closed-under-left-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-left-multiplication-ideal-Semiring R
      ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-closed-under-right-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-right-multiplication-ideal-Semiring R
      ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-subset-Semiring R
      subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
  is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    is-closed-under-two-sided-multiplication-ideal-Semiring R
      ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring

  contains-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    (i : I) → is-in-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring (x i)
  contains-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring i =
    contains-subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring)
      ( x i)
      ( unit-trunc-Prop (i , refl))

  abstract
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
      is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x
        ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
      J =
      is-image-subtype-subtype-im x (subset-ideal-Semiring R J) ∘iff
      is-ideal-generated-by-subset-ideal-subset-Semiring R
        ( generating-subset-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring)
        ( J)

  leq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    {l4 : Level} (K : ideal-Semiring l4 R)
    (k : (i : I) → is-in-ideal-Semiring R K (x i)) →
    leq-ideal-Semiring R ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring K
  leq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    leq-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x
      ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
      is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
```

## Properties

### Any two ideals generated by the same family of elements contain the same elements

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 l4 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} (x : I → type-Semiring R)
  (J : ideal-Semiring l3 R)
  (U : is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x J)
  (K : ideal-Semiring l4 R)
  (V : is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x K)
  where

  has-same-elements-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    has-same-elements-ideal-Semiring R J K
  pr1 (has-same-elements-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring r) =
    leq-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x J U K
      ( contains-element-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring
        R x K V)
      ( r)
  pr2 (has-same-elements-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring r) =
    leq-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x K V J
      ( contains-element-is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring
        R x J U)
      ( r)
```

### Any ideal that has the same elements as the ideal generated by a family of elements `x` satisfies the universal property of the ideal generated by the family of elements `x`

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} (x : I → type-Semiring R)
  (J : ideal-Semiring l3 R)
  where

  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-has-same-elements-Semiring :
    has-same-elements-ideal-Semiring R
      ( ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x)
      ( J) →
    is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-Semiring R x J
  is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-has-same-elements-Semiring H K =
    logical-equivalence-reasoning
      leq-ideal-Semiring R J K
      ↔ leq-ideal-Semiring R (ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x) K
        by
        iff-Π-iff-family
          ( λ y →
            ( λ f → f ∘ forward-implication (H y)) ,
            ( λ f → f ∘ backward-implication (H y)))
      ↔ ((i : I) → is-in-ideal-Semiring R K (x i))
        by
        is-ideal-generated-by-family-of-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring
          R x K
```

### The ideal `⟨xᵢ⟩` is trivial if and only if `zero-Semiring R ＝ xᵢ` for every `i`

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} (x : I → type-Semiring R)
  where

  is-trivial-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    ((i : I) → is-zero-Semiring R (x i)) →
    is-trivial-ideal-Semiring R (ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x)
  is-trivial-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring H K =
    leq-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x (trivial-ideal-Semiring R) H _ K

  is-family-of-zeroes-is-trivial-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    is-trivial-ideal-Semiring R (ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x) →
    (i : I) → is-zero-Semiring R (x i)
  is-family-of-zeroes-is-trivial-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring H i =
    H (contains-elements-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x i)
```

### For any map `f : J → I` and any family of elements `x : I → R`, the ideal `⟨x ∘ f⟩` is contained in the ideal `⟨x⟩`

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} {J : UU l3}
  (x : I → type-Semiring R) (f : J → I)
  where

  inclusion-precomp-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    leq-ideal-Semiring R
      ( ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R (x ∘ f))
      ( ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x)
  inclusion-precomp-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    preserves-order-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subtype-im (x ∘ f))
      ( subtype-im x)
      ( inclusion-precomp-im x f)

module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level} (R : Semiring l1) {I : UU l2} {J : UU l3}
  (y : J → type-Semiring R) (x : I → type-Semiring R) (f : J → I)
  (H : coherence-triangle-maps y x f)
  where

  inclusion-coherence-triangle-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring :
    leq-ideal-Semiring R
      ( ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R y)
      ( ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring R x)
  inclusion-coherence-triangle-ideal-family-of-elements-Semiring =
    preserves-order-ideal-subset-Semiring R
      ( subtype-im y)
      ( subtype-im x)
      ( inclusion-coherence-triangle-im y x f H)
```
